title: Thousands in Iran Attend Burial of Children Killed in Bombing of School
summary_full: There were students attending classes at the time that the school was destroyed. Some 175 people were killed by the attack on the girls’ elementary school.
summary_public: There were students attending classes at the time that the school was destroyed. Some 175 people were killed by the attack on the girls’ elementary school.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Children Killed in Bombing of School
